seedanceSegments.title: Red sauce hook and roux
seedanceSegments.description: Texture-first red sauce cloak, then chili roux, stock whisk, simmer bubbles and spoon ribbon.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @KitchenIslandOverhead only for the opening pan sauce pour. Use @InductionCloseup only for saucepan sauce-making. Use @SaucepanSmall, @Whisk and @Spoon only as object references. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseTopDown to preserve visible hands when needed. Use @RedEnchiladaSauceGloss as the target sauce color and viscosity reference: deep red-brown, glossy, spoon-coating, not tomato soup. Generate exactly 7 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro texture-first, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only synchronized sauce pour, whisk scrape, simmer bubbles, spoon drip. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s thick red sauce pours over parallel tortilla rolls; 0.7-1.3s hard cut to chili roux whisked in saucepan; 1.3-2.0s stock stream enters roux; 2.0-2.8s smooth sauce forms around whisk; 2.8-3.6s slow simmer bubbles; 3.6-4.3s spoon lifts sauce; 4.3-5.0s sauce falls as a glossy ribbon. Global negatives: no text, no captions, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no flame, no tomato chunks, no extra hands, no floating utensils.

seedanceSegments.title: Chicken chile bean filling
seedanceSegments.description: Induction filling sequence: onion sizzle, chicken and chiles, cooked state, whole black beans folded in.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity. Use @InductionWide only for the first setup shot. Use @InductionCloseup for all pan details. Use @Spatula only as the folding utensil. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterRight only to preserve the character hands at the pan edge. Use @ChickenChileBeanFilling as the target cooked filling reference: opaque juicy chicken cubes, green chile flecks, translucent onion, whole black beans, light steam. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, mostly macro detail, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only pan sizzle, ingredient tumble, spatula fold. Mandatory timing: 0.0-0.7s induction pan setup with oil sheen; 0.7-1.4s onions hit oil and sizzle; 1.4-2.1s diced chicken and green chiles slide in; 2.1-2.5s hard cut; 2.5-3.6s cooked chicken steams with green flecks; 3.6-5.0s black beans tumble in and fold through, staying whole. Global negatives: no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no flame, no raw chicken lingering after the hard cut, no bean paste, no extra hands.

Use @FilledTortillaLine as the geometry reference for a flour tortilla with red sauce, a centered chunky chicken-bean line and shredded cheese ready to roll. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, clean overhead details, no text on screen. Use @SaucedCheesePan as the reference for the red-sauced, shredded-cheese-covered state before baking. seedanceSegments.title: Bake and bubbling reveal
seedanceSegments.description: Oven insertion, hard cut to bubbling sauce, blistered cheese, crisp edge and steaming finished pan.
seedanceSegments.prompt: Use @KitchenIslandDefault for global Licorn kitchen identity and final counter reveal. Use @OvenWide only for the already-open oven insertion. Use @OvenCloseup only for baked close-ups. Use @SaucedCheesePan only as the pre-bake pan state: red sauce and unmelted shredded cheese. Use @BakedMeltyEnchiladas as the baked target state: bubbling red sauce, melted blistered cheese, slightly crisp tortilla edges, visible steam. Generate exactly 6 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 6 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. TikTok/Reels food ASMR style, macro heat payoff, no text on screen. Integrated audio: no speech, no voiceover, no music; only dish slide, oven warmth, sauce bubble, cheese crackle, ceramic set-down. Mandatory timing: 0.0-1.0s pre-bake pan slides into already-open oven; 1.0-1.4s hard cut; 1.4-2.5s red sauce bubbles at the pan edge; 2.5-3.6s cheese melts into glossy golden blisters; 3.6-4.5s one tortilla edge is slightly crisp and browned; 4.5-6.0s finished dish rests on island with steam. Global negatives: no text, no speech, no voiceover, no music, no oven door action, no flame, no free morphing, no dry unmelted cheese after bake.

seedanceSegments.title: Serve, cheese pull and filling reveal

Use @Spatula only as the serving utensil. Use @CharacterSheet and @PoseThreeQuarterLeft only to preserve visible hands supporting the lift. Generate exactly 5 short shots with hard cuts, total duration 5 seconds, no slow motion, no soft transitions, no extra shots. seedanceSegments.title: Final Licorn hero

Use @CharacterSheet, @CharacterExpressions and @PoseFront only to preserve a satisfied Licorn character visible behind or beside the food, not blocking it.
